action: Stored all 5 generated videos under the source conv_id, saving metadata including mapping of genre to avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (set to 2 hours after generation).
fallback_action: If saving metadata fails, retry saving up to three times; if the issue persists, notify the user for alternative instructions.

recipe.steps: Collect each video’s metadata: genre, avatar ID, video URL, generation timestamp, and compute an expiry timestamp set 2 hours after generation.
Bundle all 5 videos’ metadata under the source conv_id for organized future access.
Save the complete metadata record using the assistant’s memory saving tool.
